# Copilot Instructions for EMOCA

- **App shell**: Expo RN app using PagerView with a custom floating tab bar; three pages rendered in [App.tsx](App.tsx) (Countdown, Collection, MyStage). Countdown and Collection pages each mount their own NavigationContainer; MyStage is plain screen.
- **State source of truth**: Live data comes from [contexts/RecordsContext.tsx](contexts/RecordsContext.tsx) (AsyncStorage key `@records`). Use `ChekiRecord` shape `{ id, artist, liveName, date, venue?, imageUrl, memo, detail?, qrCode? }`. Prefer `useRecords()` over local state; use `addRecord/updateRecord/deleteRecord` helpers.
- **Initial data**: One seed record is kept in context; if AsyncStorage has data it overrides seed. Date strings are stored as `YYYY.MM.DD` and parsed with `new Date(date.replace(/\./g,'-'))` (see Countdown/MyStage logic).
- **Tab bar contract**: [components/FloatingTabBar.tsx](components/FloatingTabBar.tsx) is a hand-rolled bar driven by `PagerView`; `navigation.navigate(name)` just switches pages via `setPage(index)` in [App.tsx](App.tsx). If you add tabs, update both the `routes` array and the icon mapping in FloatingTabBar.
- **Collection stack**: Defined in [screens/CollectionScreen.tsx](screens/CollectionScreen.tsx). Stack routes: `List`, `Settings`, `Add`, `Detail`. `List` shows animated `TicketCard`s and an `AddCardButton`; tap animates out then opens `TicketDetail` modal, closing animates the card back in. `Add` screen builds a record (image picker, custom date picker, optional memo/detail/qrCode) and calls `addNewRecord`; validation requires image, artist, liveName, and date. `Detail`/modal view uses `TicketDetail` for full ticket UI.
- **Countdown stack**: [screens/CountdownScreen.tsx](screens/CountdownScreen.tsx) picks the first record as “next live” and runs a ticking countdown. If no record, shows empty state CTA. `LiveEditScreen` modal currently only closes; wiring it to `addRecord/updateRecord` would persist edits. Settings route is shared.
- **MyStage screen**: [screens/MyStageScreen.tsx](screens/MyStageScreen.tsx) surfaces hero image, stats, and a random memory based on `records`. Users can override the hero image via ImagePicker; the URI is persisted under AsyncStorage key `@oshi_image`.
- **Ticket UI components**: [components/TicketCard.tsx](components/TicketCard.tsx) and [components/TicketDetail.tsx](components/TicketDetail.tsx) lean on SVG, Animated, and QR codes; keep prop contracts stable (`record`, `animationDirection`, `onAnimationEnd`). `FallbackQRCode` is used when `qrCode` is absent.
- **Theme**: Shared colors/spacing/typography live in [theme.ts](theme.ts). New UI should use `theme` tokens for spacing, radius, and typography instead of ad-hoc values; background defaults are black/secondary dark.
- **Assets/fonts**: Custom font `Aoharu` is loaded in [App.tsx](App.tsx) via `useFonts`; splash stays up until fonts load (`SplashScreen.preventAutoHideAsync`). Don’t render UI until fonts loaded.
- **Image and picker usage**: Uses `expo-image` for rendering and `expo-image-picker` for user selection (see AddScreen, LiveEditScreen, MyStage). Request media permissions before picking.
- **AsyncStorage keys**: `@records` for collection data, `@oshi_image` for the user’s hero image. Avoid collisions; keep writes batched in provider effects.
- **Build/run commands**: `npm start` or `npm run start` (Expo dev server), `npm run android`, `npm run ios`, `npm run web`. Requires Expo SDK 54 and RN 0.81; ensure `react-native-reanimated` Babel plugin is configured via Expo preset.
- **Navigation expectations**: Because each page mounts its own NavigationContainer, cross-tab navigation is handled by PagerView, not React Navigation tabs. When adding routes inside a page, keep them under that page’s stack to avoid navigation scope clashes.
- **Design tone**: App skews dark with glassmorphism accents and rounded tickets; match existing gradients, blur, and rounded shapes when adding UI. Reuse `theme.shadows`/`theme.card` sizing for tickets.
- **Common pitfalls**: Missing font load causes blank screen (App returns null until `fontsLoaded`). Countdown assumes record date string format; invalid formats break the timer silently. Animated ticket views rely on width-to-height ratio `0.366`; keep ratio when composing new cards.
- **Testing guidance**: No automated tests present; rely on Expo client/manual verification. When touching AsyncStorage logic, manually clear storage between runs if schema changes.

Feel free to refine or extend sections if parts of the app evolve (e.g., wiring LiveEdit into RecordsContext, adding new tabs). Suggest edits if any area above is unclear or incomplete.
